name: pkcs-comprehensive-markdown-image-block-parsing
title: brainstorm: PKCS comprehensive Markdown image block parsing
description: Design broader Markdown image recognition and image block grouping for common Markdown/HTML image forms.
creator: tantless
notes: Completed broader Markdown image syntax recognition on top of the existing transient Markdown block graph. Current repo verification confirms the implementation is present and the full test suite passes.

meta.recommended_approach: Enhance ParsedMarkdownBlockGraph classification and binding so linked, blockquote, reference, and HTML image syntax become image blocks with deterministic caption/nearby-text grouping.
meta.scope_decision: Implement image recognition enhancement only; do not introduce a full MarkdownBlock AST in this task.
meta.implementation_direction: Confirmed: implement on top of the existing transient block graph enhancement plan and continue this strategy if acceptance succeeds.
meta.state_sync: 2026-06-15: status synchronized from review to completed after confirming implementation, acceptance report, and current full pytest result.
